name: Deep Seabed Mining Law Corpus
tagline: A neutral, authoritative, machine-readable record of the law governing mineral resources of the Area — the seabed beyond national jurisdiction — built provenance-first. Every text carries its source, retrieval date, official citation, language, an authoritative-status flag, and a content hash; every change is a new dated version. Derived structure and concept tags are clearly labelled and never conflated with the authoritative texts.
